name: I talked to the insurance guy already about my fume exposure—did I mess up?
description: Maybe—lawyer can mitigate; halt talks now.[2]

mainEntity.name: I talked to the insurance guy already about my fume exposure—did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe—lawyer can mitigate; halt talks now.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Possibly**—adjusters seek lowball statements; recorded calls can hurt claims.[2]

No legal harm if truthful, but limits future arguments.[1]

**Key factors:**
- What you admitted
- Symptom minimization
- Signed releases

**Practical guidance:** Lawyer reviews transcript; stops further contact.
Damage control possible.
